## What type of change is this?

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New fractal / shader
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tests

## Summary

<!-- One paragraph: what changed and why. Link any related issue with "Fixes #N" or "Closes #N". -->

## Testing done

<!-- Which platforms / devices did you test on? Which tests did you run? -->

- [ ] `flutter test` passes
- [ ] `flutter analyze` clean
- [ ] Tested on: <!-- Android / iOS / Chrome / Linux / ... -->

## Screenshots / recordings

<!-- Required for any visible UI change. Drag and drop images or a GIF here. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows the style in `CONTRIBUTING.md`
- [ ] New/changed public APIs have dartdoc comments
- [ ] Localization strings added to `lib/l10n/app_en.arb` (and `app_es.arb` if you can)
- [ ] New shaders registered in `pubspec.yaml` under `flutter.shaders`
- [ ] No analyzer warnings introduced
